headline: PTPTN Repayment Rate Drops Below 50% for 2025
context: The National Higher Education Fund Corporation reported that less than half of borrowers made scheduled repayments in 2025.

cards.big: RM45 billion disbursed since 1997 but only RM18 billion recovered
cards.sub: PTPTN faces sustainability crisis as default rates climb

cards.big: 2.8 million borrowers owe outstanding balances as of December 2025
cards.sub: Average individual debt stands at RM16,000 per borrower

cards.big: Salary deduction mechanism introduced in 2019 covers only 34% of borrowers
cards.sub: Self-employed and informal workers remain outside the system

cards.big: B40 households account for 62% of all PTPTN borrowers since 2010
cards.sub: Loan burden disproportionately affects lower-income families

cards.big: Treating education loans like commercial debt ignores their social investment purpose
Should Malaysia shift to income-contingent repayment like Australia's HECS
